goal: Ship the smallest reliable booking request flow so customers can request a specific service slot and admins can safely moderate requests before handoff.

inScope: customer picks preferred date and time window
customer submits request with contact details
request stored as pending for moderation
basic email notification on approved request

submit: phone (required, E.164 or GR local normalized)

dateRules: preferredDate must be >= tomorrow (no same-day for MVP)
preferredDate must be <= 45 days from today
submissionLimits: max 3 booking requests per phone per 24h
max 5 booking requests per IP per 24h
constraints.dedupe: reject exact duplicates (same phone + jobSlug + preferredDate + preferredWindow) within 12h

moderationSafeguards.defaultFlow: pending -> approved unless blocked by safeguards
autoRejectRules: notes contain clear spam URL patterns
duplicate submission hit by dedupe rule
autoFlagRules: high velocity: >2 requests from same phone in 1h
notes include phone/email different from submitter contact
suspicious keyword match list (casino, crypto giveaway, adult spam)

rejected: optional silent reject for obvious spam
generic error copy to user when immediate reject occurs

acceptanceCriteria: User can complete service -> date/time -> submit flow in <= 3 screens
Server validates required fields and date/time constraints
Valid request is created with status=pending
Auto-reject and auto-flag safeguards trigger from configured rules
Admin can approve or reject pending/flagged requests with reason
Approved request triggers email notifications to customer/admin
Duplicate and rate-limited submissions are blocked with clear error copy
All status transitions are recorded in audit history
